career_focus.summary: Interested in building user-centered digital products through web, mobile, and system development, with focus on clean implementation, responsive UI, RESTful API integration, and maintainable software workflow.

items.category: Web Maintenance, Requirement Analysis, and System Support
items.context: Worked in a technology solution company environment involving WordPress website maintenance, internal CRM & ACM planning, and C# gate parking system requirement analysis.
items.description: Supported company website maintenance and internal system development planning, including CRM, ACM, and gate parking system needs.
highlights: Improved and maintained the company WordPress website by updating page structure, visual presentation, and content/UI quality.
Supported requirement analysis and development planning for internal CRM & ACM systems and a C#-based gate parking system.

items.context: Worked on web application development tasks using Next.js, React.js, Laravel, and Agile Scrum workflow.
items.description: Contributed to web application maintenance and UI implementation by fixing bugs in React/Next.js applications and implementing responsive interfaces in Laravel-based pages.
highlights: Fixed bugs in Next.js and React.js applications within an Agile Scrum development workflow.
Implemented responsive UI designs into Laravel-based web pages.
